title: Image Component
description: Render an image from a remote URL using the Image component from react-native.
problemStatement:
Visual content! Use the `<Image>` component to display a remote image from the URL: `"https://reactnative.dev/img/tiny_logo.png"`.

**Requirement:** Provide a `source` prop with a `uri` object, and give the image a `width` and `height` of `50`.
hints: Unlike local images, remote images MUST have their width and height defined manually.
expectedOutput: A 50x50 icon displayed on the mobile screen
